query: SELECT p.id AS participant_id, p.displayName AS participant_name, p.totalPoints AS participant_total_points, COALESCE(SUM(bw.points_awarded), 0) AS stored_boost_points, COUNT(bw.id) AS stored_boost_rows FROM participants p LEFT JOIN boost_wins bw ON bw.user_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.totalPoints ORDER BY stored_boost_points DESC, p.totalPoints DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT p.id AS participant_id, p.displayName AS participant_name, p.totalPoints AS participant_total_points, COALESCE(SUM(bw.points_awarded), 0) AS stored_boost_points, COUNT(bw.id) AS stored_boost_rows FROM participants p LEFT JOIN boost_wins bw ON bw.user_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.displayName, p.totalPoints ORDER BY stored_boost_points DESC, p.totalPoints DESC;
